title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences

Announcements

Branded Course

25
						January

2018

BBA427 Innovation Management
course will be conducted as branded course by Business Administration
Department in 2017-2018 Spring Semester. Students who take the course will be
entitled to receive a certificate at the end of the semester. The course will
be cover  the methodology of "Design Thinking" as well as the
theoretical part, and projects will be developed in the Arçelik Garage
environment. The company provides internship and O’Coop opportunities to our
students.
